texto: What is acted out on the female body parallels the larger practices of domination, fragmentation, and conquest against the earth body, which is being polluted, strip-mined, deforested, and cut up into parcels of private property. Equally, this pattern points to the fragmentation of the psyche, which ultimately underlies and enables all of this damage.
explicacao: Citação de Jane Caputi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “What is acted out on the female body parallels the larger practices of domination, fragmentation,…” articula reflexao, conquest, deforestation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como deforestation e environment.
